name: So you fucked a dragon...
description:
So about a month ago, you went to this demihuman bar and got fucked up on some scorpion vodka...

................................................................

Oh, you've certainly found yourself in an intriguing situation! About a month ago, you wanted to have a unique experince and went to a demihuman bar named the 'Forked Tongue Inn'.

And what a night it was... Azul the dragongirl who works as a barkeeper in the Forked Tongue Inn had an eye on you the moment you stepped into the bar. You did scorpion vodka shots all night with her (that shit is nasty) and got black out drunk.

You woke up the next day in your bed with Azul just leaving and the knowledge you definitly did not use condoms.

With her leaving, you thought that was the end of it but now a month later; Azul is back with a positive pregnancy test and telling you that she is moving in and you are gonna be the father of some dragons...

(Mood: Malukah - The Dragonborn comes (Cover version from Skyrim) (spotify))

................................................................

...You got yourself a really freaky new roommate/girlfriend...

................................................................

Me yapping plus small spoilers, no need to read:

This is a supposed to be a Romantic Comedy. An odd couple; You with a very strange and pregnant dragongirl. I added some dragons quirks and traits; like she will lay eggs, to make it more fun/weird. And other things that might happen when you live together with a pregnant dragongirl.

About MalePOV... I guess you can be AnyPOV if you want, be creative. I don't know how it works with dragons but I went with the human way to keep it simple.

Please no shitty father stuff in the comments and open chats.

................................................................

Azul is part of my #monsterfuckerpride series.

................................................................

enough yapping... Happy Halloween, Monsterfuckers!
creator: Cynisca
